Response Desk
Inbound reply triage · intent detection · next-action routing · draft-only responses
Import an email reply, review the context, then let Response Desk classify intent and draft next actions. Nothing is sent automatically.
Source: Not yet selected
Import Email is local/manual until inbox integration is connected. Paste mode remains as a fallback. Connected inbox import can route replies automatically when configured.
Inbound reply
Imported email
Manual import: paste the email fields above. Live inbox connection is not configured.
Draft only — not sent. Response Desk never auto-sends, never auto-submits, and never dispatches email. All outbound responses require explicit human approval.
Response Desk output (review-only)
1 · Reply summary
Paste a reply and click Analyze reply.
2 · Intent + urgency
Intent classification + urgency / revenue / risk will appear here.
3 · Recommended next action
Recommended next action will appear here.
4 · Pipeline recommendation (advisory)
Pipeline-stage suggestion will appear here.
5 · Task recommendation
Task recommendation will appear here.
6 · Response options (draft only — not sent)
Direct-close draft will appear here.
Consultative draft will appear here.
Short-executive draft will appear here.
7 · Safety flags
Safety flags will appear here.
8 · Human approval required
All outbound responses require explicit human approval. Response Desk does not auto-send, auto-submit, or dispatch email.

Settings
API keys · Automation config · System identifiers
API Keys
Used for AI Generate, Response Desk, Intro Email generation
Phase 25E.3: SourceDeck owns lead management locally. Airtable is supported as an optional legacy export integration only — not required for normal use.
Used by the SAM.gov Opportunity Outreach scan and SAM Sprint. Phase 24K: also available in the Setup Wizard during onboarding. The SAM search screen does not prompt for credentials.
Re-walk the onboarding flow (Welcome → Business → Targeting → API Keys → Quick Tour → Confirmation). Does not erase saved credentials.

IBM mode (optional)
IBM watsonx.ai and IBM Cloud Object Storage are environment-configured. Default behavior is local — no IBM calls are made unless AI_PROVIDER=watsonx or STORAGE_PROVIDER=ibm-cos is set. This panel only shows status; it never displays your API keys.

GovCon Pipeline
Federal opportunities · SAM.gov
GovCon Mode — Capture OS workflow
Active surface · Capture → Solicitation → Vendor + Pricing → Proof + Teaming → Submission readiness
GovCon
Other business tools (Lead Generator, Email Tracker, Ad Engine, Socials, Clinical/EHR, etc.) remain available in the sidebar but this demo focuses on the GovCon capture workflow. SourceDeck does not submit bids, quotes, or government responses; no outreach is sent automatically; human approval is required for every action.
GovCon Outreach OS
Find opportunities → score fit → prepare draft outreach → identify prime partners → review and approve. Drafts only. Human approval required. Follow solicitation instructions and communication windows.
GovCon Mode · Demo Controls
Demo data not loaded. Working with operator-entered data only.
SAMPLE DEMO DATA — Replace before proposal use
The GovCon workspace below is currently populated with operator-loaded SAMPLE / DEMO ONLY data. No row reflects a real agency, real solicitation, real vendor, real CPARS rating, real submission status, or real award. SourceDeck does not submit bids, quotes, or government responses. The user must clear sample data and replace with their own before any proposal use.
Demo data is local only. No external call. No bid, quote, or government-response submission. No portal upload. No email transmission. Sample rows are clearly labeled "SAMPLE", "Demo only", or "Replace before proposal use".

Deadline & Q&A Calendar
Proposal due · Q&A · Site visit · Amendment watch
Q&A submission deadline — Sample RFP A
SAMPLE · 2 days
Draft Q&A package locally. Operator submits in the agency portal. SourceDeck does not submit. No portal upload.
Amendment watch — Sample RFP B
SAMPLE · 5 days
Re-shred compliance matrix if amendment posts. No live SAM call from this panel; operator verifies on SAM.gov directly.
Site visit — Sample RFP C
SAMPLE · 7 days
Operator coordinates attendance via the agency's published contact. SourceDeck does not send attendance email.
Proposal due — Sample RFP A
SAMPLE · 14 days
Operator submits via the solicitation's stated channel. SourceDeck does not submit. No portal upload. No SAM.gov / PIEE / eBuy / GSA interaction.
Clarification window closes — Sample RFI D
SAMPLE · 21 days
Operator decides whether to submit clarification questions through the agency's contracting officer. Drafts only; human approval required.
Countdown labels are advisory. Always confirm timestamps against the live SAM.gov solicitation record. SourceDeck does not call agency portals from this panel.
Pre-RFP Intelligence
Sources Sought · Forecast · Recompete watchlist · Industry day
Sources Sought — Sample Agency · IT services
SAMPLE
Prepare capability statement variant for this NAICS / agency pair before the RFP drops. Draft only; human approval required.
Forecast / acquisition plan signal — Sample Agency
SAMPLE
Public acquisition forecast indicates likely solicitation Q3. Operator confirms by checking the agency's published forecast.
Recompete watch — Sample contract ending in 9 months
SAMPLE
Past-pattern note: similar recompete had a 30-day Q&A window last cycle. Use to plan capture timeline. Advisory only.
Industry Day — Sample Agency · attend or skip?
SAMPLE
Operator decides attendance. SourceDeck does not send registration email; the agency portal is the system of record.
All signals are operator-curated. SourceDeck does not scrape live agency forecasts in this panel. Replace sample rows with your own watchlist before proposal use.

Stakeholder Graph
FAR-aware capture planning · Reference intelligence only · Human approval required
Internal capture planning only. SourceDeck does not contact government officials, submit materials, upload to portals, or guarantee procurement outcomes.
RESTRICTED WINDOW Sample state: contracting officer is in a restricted communication window — use the agency's official Q&A mechanism only. No direct outreach.
Map agency, prime, vendor, and internal stakeholders to plan compliant capture actions. SourceDeck does not contact or submit to stakeholders.

Internal owner map
Synthetic UI category · Local capture-team note · Never transmitted
Internal capture owner
Your team (you)
SAMPLE
Internal — synthetic
Posture: Internal capture planning only.
Local capture-team owner for this pursuit. Local note only; never transmitted by SourceDeck.
SAMPLE — replace with the operator-team owner from your pursuit profile.
Synthetic UI-only category. Carries the data-synthetic="true" marker so it can never be sent back through a backend-expecting code path.
SourceDeck does not draft or send outreach to contracting officers, contracting specialists, or CORs. Communications during a restricted communication window must be routed through the official mechanism named in the solicitation. Pre-RFP capability conversations with Small Business Specialists or program offices are appropriate when the agency permits them; respect industry-day formats and source-sought response windows. See FAR 3.104 (procurement integrity) and the solicitation's Section L communication instructions before initiating any contact.

Score · Status · Checklist · Compliance · Pricing · Vendors · Past performance · Capability · Forms · Risks · Human approval · Package

Human-Approved Package Export
Package name · Solicitation · Notes · Included sections · Preview
Package export prepares internal review materials only. SourceDeck does not submit, upload, email, or transmit this package. The user must complete official submission outside SourceDeck.
Included sections
Package export prepares internal review materials only. SourceDeck does not submit, upload, email, or transmit this package. No portal upload. No email attachment. No SAM/PIEE/eBuy/GSA interaction. The user must complete official submission outside SourceDeck.
Internal Review Package Preview (local only)
Local preview only — SourceDeck does not submit, upload, email, or transmit.
No package preview generated yet. Fill in the package name / solicitation / notes, choose included sections, and click "Build Package Preview". The output is a local internal review preview only — SourceDeck does not submit, upload, email, or transmit this package.
Human Review Required
SourceDeck does not submit bids, quotes, or government responses. SourceDeck does not submit, upload, email, or transmit this package. No portal upload. No email attachment. No SAM / PIEE / eBuy / GSA interaction from this surface. Submission readiness scoring is advisory and reflects local checklist completion only. The user must complete official submission outside SourceDeck. Human approval required for every action.
GovCon Pursuit Profile
Profile-backed scoring · settings required
Manual setup · no auto-send
Complete your GovCon Pursuit Profile before relying on SAM rankings. Scoring is driven by your profile — when fields are missing, results are marked preliminary.
Fields the sprint scorer reads
  • • Contract goal (goal name + 30/90-day revenue target)
  • • Target NAICS codes
  • • Active service lanes
  • • Geography (primary states / national / remote)
  • • Certifications (SDVOSB, MBE, HUBZone, etc.)
  • • Capacity (response time, sub network, quote speed)
  • • Risk filters (clearance, construction, supply-only)
  • • Past performance status
Manual review is locked on; outreach is always human-gated.
Plan-aware NAICS access
Free users: 1 NAICS per sprint. Paid users: all configured NAICS codes.
Plan limits affect active searches only, not saved profile preferences.
Setup path
Open the GovCon Setup Wizard (already available in the GovCon header bar) to populate certifications, NAICS, and capability fields. The SAM Sprint scorer reads from the same profile.
Profile is stored locally as a JSON file under your SourceDeck app-data directory. SAM_GOV_API_KEY is never stored in the profile.
Human approval required
Email drafts are generated for review only. SourceDeck does not send outreach, submit quotes, or contact agencies without human approval.
SAM Opportunity Sprint
7-day · 30-day pulse · profile-driven scoring
Manual-only · drafts only
Available to all users. Free users can search 1 NAICS code per sprint. Paid users can search all configured NAICS codes. Paid plans unlock full NAICS coverage for broader sprint searches.
Your GovCon Pursuit Profile controls scoring accuracy. Complete your goal, NAICS, service lanes, geography, certifications, capacity, risk filters, and past performance before relying on rankings.
Target NAICS (defaults)
238320 · 561720 · 561210 · 561790 · 541611 · 541618 · 541930
Painting · Janitorial · Facilities Support · Other Bldg Svcs · Admin Mgmt Consulting · Other Mgmt Consulting · Translation
Service lanes
Painting · Janitorial · Facility Turnover · Punch-List · Facilities Support · Admin Consulting · Translation · Staffing · Sub Management
Operator selects lanes in the Pursuit Profile.
Certifications · Geography
SDVOSB · VOSB · HUBZone · MBE · DBE · SBE · WOSB · 8(a) · Small Business
Primary states + national_allowed + excluded_states drive geography scoring.
Pursue Immediately
Score ≥ 90 · BID
Strong Outreach Target
Score 75–89 · prepare capability + quote
Review / Possible Quote
Score 60–74 · review before action
Archive
Score < 60 · skip
Generated report paths
  • reports/sam-opportunity-sprint.json
  • reports/sam-opportunity-sprint.md
  • reports/sam-outreach-targets.csv
  • reports/sam-email-drafts.md
Reports are written locally and are not committed by default. The operator decides whether to keep, share, or archive them.
Free plan reports identify which NAICS were searched and which configured NAICS were withheld by plan limit.
Top-10 email drafts
Email drafts are generated for review only. SourceDeck does not send outreach, submit quotes, or contact agencies without human approval.
Run from terminal (manual)
export SAM_GOV_API_KEY=... # value supplied by operator; never paste into chat npm run sam:sprint # or: node scripts/sam-opportunity-sprint.js
The CLI loads SAM_GOV_API_KEY from the process environment only. If the key is missing, the script exits safely with a not_configured notice and makes no network calls.
Feature spec: docs/features/sam-opportunity-sprint.md
Release notes: docs/release-notes/sam-opportunity-sprint.md

Proposal Workspace
Section-by-section internal review drafting · Human approval gate on every section
Internal review only. Drafts produced here are not legal review, not compliance certification, and not final proposals. SourceDeck does not send, submit, or upload anything to SAM.gov, PIEE, eBuy, GSA, or any agency portal. The user is responsible for every external action.
Sections
Select a section to begin. Each section is drafted, reviewed, and finalized one at a time. SourceDeck does not generate a full proposal in one click.
—
Not Started
User Finalized. This section is locked. Use Reset Section to edit again. SourceDeck still does not submit, send, or upload — the user is responsible for taking the finalized draft outside SourceDeck.

Help / FAQ
Plain English answers · 9 sections · 20 questions each
Phase 25E.4: Plain-English help written at a fourth-grade reading level. Read the full manual at docs/manuals/sourcedeck-user-manual-4th-grade.md. If a word still feels hard, tell your operator.
No FAQ items match your search. Try a shorter word or check the user manual.
Need more help? Ask your pilot operator first (Tier 1, business-day response). For product defects or credential-boundary questions, your operator can escalate to Tier 2 engineering on your behalf (48-hour response).
Clinical Capability / EHR Mode
Optional deployment mode — configure, implement, and monitor clinical workflow readiness
Optional Capability

Clinical Capability / EHR Mode

When enabled, SourceDeck gains encounter documentation, dictation/transcription, review/approval, and multi-location office deployment workflows — packaged as ChartNav-style medical capability. Your standard SourceDeck features remain fully available.

encounter workflow dictation / transcription review / approval office deployment
DISABLED
Implementation Mode

Choose how you want this capability deployed. Your choice can be changed before go-live.

Configuration & Setup

Enter your organization details. These are persisted locally and used for deployment scoping. No data leaves your machine until you explicitly connect a control plane.

Deployment Readiness

Readiness checks are evaluated locally against your configuration. Once all prerequisites pass, the go-live gate turns green.

Mode

Go-Live

Note: Readiness checks are evaluated locally. No data is transmitted to any external service until you explicitly connect a control-plane endpoint. SourceDeck remains a local-first system in standard and clinical modes.
ChartNav Connection

Wire SourceDeck to a live ChartNav deployment. Base URL fetches the public /capability/manifest. Admin token (optional) unlocks live deployment telemetry via /admin/deployment/overview. When disconnected, the panes below stay safe and truthful — no fake live data.

Stored in the OS keystore (macOS Keychain / Windows DPAPI / libsecret) via Electron safeStorage; plaintext fallback only when the OS keystore is unavailable.
DISCONNECTED no integration attempted yet
Manifest
idle
Telemetry
idle

        GovCon Setup
        
      
        
        Step 1 of 11
        
      
        
    
        
    
        
      
      
        
        
        1. Welcome to SourceDeck
        
        
        SourceDeck helps you organize GovCon pursuits from opportunity discovery to internal-review package. You stay in control of every send, upload, submission, and decision.
        
        
        What this wizard sets up: your business profile, GovCon targeting filters, API keys (including SAM.gov), and approval rules. You can skip optional steps and return later from Settings → Run Setup Wizard.
        
        
        SourceDeck prepares internal review materials. It never sends outreach, submits bids/quotes/proposals, or uploads to SAM.gov / PIEE / eBuy / GSA on your behalf. Every action requires your explicit human approval.
        
        
        After completing this wizard, the GovCon Capture OS becomes your default workspace.
        
      
        
      
      
        
        
        2. Business profile
        
        
        Tell SourceDeck who you are so capture and content outputs use your real context. Stored locally as profile context — never as a credential.
        
        
        
        
        
        
        
        
        
        
        
        
        
        
        
        
        
        
        
        
        
        
        
      
        
      
      
        
        
        3. Capability statement
        
        
        Paste your capability statement text to extract candidate fields. Nothing is sent to any external provider — extraction runs locally. You approve each field before it is saved.
        
        
        
        
        
          
          No extraction yet
        
        
        
        Candidate fields are not verified. Review and check the ones you approve before saving.
        
        
        
        
        File upload & PDF extraction: planned (TODO) — paste text or enter fields manually for now.
        
      
        
      
      
        
        
        4. GovCon targeting
        
        
        Used as default context for SAM search, outreach, and prime-partner matching.
        
        
        
          
        
            
            
            
            
            
            
            
            
          
        
        
        
        
        
        
        
        
        
        
        
        
        
        
        
        
        
        
        
        
        
        
        
        
        
        
        
      
        
      
      
        
        
        5. SAM.gov API key
        
        
        Add your SAM.gov API key here during setup, or manage it later in Settings. SourceDeck uses this key only for authorized SAM.gov opportunity lookup. The SAM search screen does not ask you to paste credentials.
        
        
        Saved through the secure main-process credential boundary. Status is presence-only — the raw key is never displayed after save and never reaches the page or logs. SourceDeck never displays saved API key values in search screens, proposal screens, exports, demos, or logs.
        
        
        
        
        
          
          
        
        
        
        SAM.gov key missing
        
      
        
      
      
        
        
        6. AI agent API key
        
        
        Powers AI drafting and reasoning. Only add keys for services you plan to use. You can skip keys now and add them later in Settings. Saved presence-only through the credential boundary; the raw key never returns to the page.
        
        
        
          
        
        
        
        
        
        
          
          
        
        
        
        No AI key saved
        
      
        
      
      
        
        
        7. Creative / imaging API key
        
        
        Optional. Credential saved for future creative-provider workflows. Manual image prompt workflow is available now; SourceDeck does not generate or publish images on your behalf yet.
        
        
        
          
        
        
        
        
        
        
          
          
        
        
        
        No creative key saved
        
      
        
      
      
        
        
        8. Social handles & platforms
        
        
        Profile context only. SourceDeck prepares draft content — it does not post to or publish on any platform.
        
        
        
        
        
        
        
        
        
        
        
        
        
        
        
          
        
            
            
            
            
            
          
        
        
        
        
        No platform posting. Handles and platform choices are profile context for draft preparation only.
        
      
        
      
      
        
        
        9. Safety & approval rules
        
        
        SourceDeck prepares drafts and decision support. You approve before outreach, proposal submission, publishing, or posting. AI outputs require human review. SourceDeck does not approve outreach, certify compliance, or make final bid decisions.
        
        
        
          
          
          
          
        
        
        
        
        
        
        
        
        
        RED_RESTRICTED blocks informal outreach during restricted windows; a KILL decision is irreversible. These guardrails protect procurement integrity. Nothing here is legal, contracting, or compliance advice.
        
      
        
      
      
        
        
        10. Quick Setup Tour
        
        
        A one-screen tour of the GovCon Capture OS surfaces you'll use most. Each feature is local-only, advisory, and requires human approval — SourceDeck never sends, submits, or uploads on your behalf.
        
        
        Quick Setup Video: Video walkthrough pending. Use the quick text tour below.
        
        
        
          
        Capture Command Center — Central pursuit board showing active pursuits, deadlines, Q&A windows, bid/no-bid review counts. Add opportunities as you intake them; advisory recommendations only.
        
          
        Operating Rhythm — Daily capture rhythm with Daily Rhythm, Deadline & Q&A Calendar, Pre-RFP Intelligence, and Agency Targeting Insights panels. Local-only operating view.
        
          
        Solicitation Workspace — Paste solicitation text to get a Section L / M / B / C / H / K shred and a starter compliance matrix. Human review required before proposal use.
        
          
        Compliance Matrix — Per-requirement matrix bound to the solicitation. Mark each requirement Draft → Addressed → Reviewed → Approved as your team works it.
        
          
        Vendor Quote Room — Vendor candidates with manual quote-status tracking. SourceDeck does not email vendors or submit quote requests on your behalf.
        
          
        Pricing Worksheet — Advisory price/margin worksheet. Operator sets the bid price; SourceDeck does not auto-quote and does not submit pricing.
        
          
        Past Performance Library — Reusable past-performance citations. Local storage; SourceDeck does not transmit your PP library.
        
          
        Capability Statement Studio — Per-opportunity capability statement tailoring. Internal review draft only; SourceDeck does not send or attest.
        
          
        Prime Partner Finder — Prime/sub team-up candidate finder driven by your configured NAICS. Mutual NDA standard before sharing capability details.
        
          
        Stakeholder Graph — FAR-aware posture labels for CO, program office, incumbent, prime/sub partners, industry-day respondents, and internal owner. Reference intelligence only.
        
          
        Submission Readiness Gate — Red / yellow / green readiness advisory: "are we responsive yet?" SourceDeck never auto-submits.
        
          
        Internal Review Markdown Export — Local Markdown export of the internal-review package. Operator delivers via their own channel; no portal upload.
        
          
        Audit Log — Local-only evidence trail of AI, storage, context, and sensitive-action events. Never includes API keys, raw prompts, or document contents.
        
          
        Response Desk — Import-first reply analysis (paste or manual import). No Send Email surface; draft-only with human approval required.
        
          
        SAM Sprint — Plan-tier SAM.gov opportunity sprint (Free = 1 NAICS, paid = multi-NAICS). Manual-review required; no autonomous submission.
        
        
        
        
        Tip: most surfaces ship with SAMPLE/DEMO rows so you can explore safely. Replace sample content with real operator data before proposal use.
        
      
        
      
      
        
        
        11. You're set up
        
        
        Setup saved. Review the summary below.
        
        
        
        
        No raw secrets are displayed anywhere in the UI. SourceDeck prepares drafts and decision support — you approve before outreach, proposal submission, publishing, or posting.
        
        
        Final confirmation. Review and check each item before completing setup:
